title: ruellia mollis
intro: Ruellia mollis, also known as Velvet Petunia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruellia mollis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
